message:
fix(codegen): Use inline for with tuple literals in set/frozenset

Tuple literals in set/frozenset() calls require inline for to avoid
'tuple field index must be comptime-known' errors in Zig.

Example: frozenset(("a", "b", "c")) now generates:
inline for (.{ "a", "b", "c" }) |_item| { ... }
instead of:
for (.{ "a", "b", "c" }) |_item| { ... }
